text_original: this app is great but somehow the chat is just small words but it's ok at least I uninstalled it and download it back hehehe. ........
text_zh: 这个应用很棒，但不知为何聊天界面的字很小，不过没关系，至少我把它卸载又重新下载回来了，嘿嘿嘿。........
reply_original: Hi! We are so glad you're enjoying Fantasia! Regarding the small text issue you mentioned, we'd love to look into this display glitch for you. Please send a screenshot of your chat screen to support@fantachat.ai so our team can fix it. It's awesome that you reinstalled to keep the journey going. Thanks for being part of our world!
reply_zh: 嗨！我们很高兴你喜欢 Fantasia！关于你提到的字体过小的问题，我们很希望能为你调查这个显示故障。请将你的聊天界面截图发送至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们的团队进行修复。非常感谢你为了继续这段旅程而重新安装应用。感谢你成为我们世界的一员！
